comment: Declarative sync manifest. The sync script writes ONLY into these dest zones (relative to the consuming project root). Everything else in the project's src/ is project-owned and never touched. This is the clobber-safety contract.
filesComment: Individually placed files — copied, never wiped (a zone wipes its whole dest dir, which would be catastrophic near the project root). Currently empty by design: the CLI tools are declared in composer.json 'bin', so Composer proxies them into vendor/bin/ — the conventional location — and placing copies in the project would duplicate them. Use this only for files a project genuinely needs on disk and that no Composer mechanism already provides.
